query:
-- Artist profiles (extended)
ALTER TABLE artists ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS verified TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;
ALTER TABLE artists ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS featured TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;
ALTER TABLE artists ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS hourlyRate INT NULL;
ALTER TABLE artists ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS depositAmount INT NULL;
ALTER TABLE artists ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS stripeAccountId VARCHAR(128) NULL;

-- Bookings
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bookings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  customerId INT NOT NULL,
  artistId INT NOT NULL,
  tattooGenerationId INT NULL,
  status ENUM('pending','deposit_paid','confirmed','completed','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  message TEXT NULL,
  stripeSessionId VARCHAR(256) NULL,
  depositAmountCents INT NULL,
  scheduledAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- Referrals
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS referrals (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  referrerId INT NOT NULL,
  referredUserId INT NULL,
  refCode VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  creditAwarded TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- Notification preferences
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notification_preferences (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  emailOnGeneration TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  emailWeeklyDigest TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  emailBookingUpdates TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- Outreach campaigns
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS outreach_campaigns (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL,
  region VARCHAR(128) NULL,
  country VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
  language VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'en',
  status ENUM('draft','scheduled','sending','completed','paused') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  scheduledAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  sentCount INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  openCount INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  clickCount INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  signupCount INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  subjectLine VARCHAR(512) NULL,
  emailBodyHtml TEXT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- Outreach contacts
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS outreach_contacts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  campaignId INT NOT NULL,
  email VARCHAR(320) NOT NULL,
  name VARCHAR(256) NULL,
  studioName VARCHAR(256) NULL,
  country VARCHAR(128) NULL,
  language VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'en',
  status ENUM('pending','sent','opened','clicked','signed_up','bounced','unsubscribed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  sentAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  openedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  clickedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  signedUpAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  trackingPixelId VARCHAR(64) NULL UNIQUE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
